evals.prompt: Set up a new Supabase project locally and create my first migration to add a 'profiles' table with columns: id (uuid, references auth.users), username (text, unique), created_at (timestamptz, default now()). Walk me through everything I need to do.
evals.expected_output: A complete step-by-step guide covering: supabase init, supabase login, supabase link, supabase start, supabase migration new, the SQL for the profiles table, and supabase db reset to apply locally
expectations: Mentions supabase init to initialize the project
Mentions supabase link --project-ref to link to remote project
Mentions supabase start to start local containers
Mentions supabase migration new to create migration file
Provides the SQL DDL for the profiles table with all three columns
Mentions supabase db reset or supabase migration up to apply migration locally

evals.prompt: I need to deploy an edge function called 'send-email' to my Supabase project. The function uses a SendGrid API key that should be stored as a secret. Show me the full workflow.
evals.expected_output: Steps covering: supabase functions new send-email, setting SENDGRID_API_KEY as a secret with supabase secrets set, supabase functions serve for local testing, and supabase functions deploy send-email for deployment. Should mention auth requirement.
expectations: Mentions supabase functions new send-email to scaffold the function
Mentions supabase secrets set to store the SendGrid API key
Mentions supabase functions serve for local testing
Mentions supabase functions deploy send-email to deploy
Mentions authentication requirement (supabase login) before deploying

evals.prompt: My Supabase project already has tables set up remotely. I want to pull the remote database schema into my local project and then generate TypeScript types from it. How do I do this?
evals.expected_output: Steps: supabase db pull to fetch remote schema as migration files, then supabase gen types --lang typescript to generate types (with --project-id flag or --local flag). Should mention linking requirement for db pull.
expectations: Mentions supabase db pull to pull remote schema
Mentions that project must be linked (supabase link) before db pull
Mentions supabase gen types --lang typescript for type generation
Shows how to pipe or save generated types to a file
Mentions either --project-id <ref> or --local flag for gen types command
